question: Will the spot exchange rate of Canadian dollars to US dollars have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-08-03?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DEXCAUS once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-08-03 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-07-24) was 1.371. (The latest value released in Canadian Dollars to U.S. Dollar Spot Exchange Rate from the release H.10 Foreign Exchange Rates.)
background:
The notes from the release: For questions on the data, please contact the data source: https://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/ContactUs/feedback.aspx?refurl=/releases/h10/%
For questions on FRED functionality, please contact: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/contactus/.  The notes from the series: Noon buying rates in New York City for cable transfers payable in foreign currencies..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Canadian Dollars to One U.S. Dollar.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily
